mte_summary: Validate BPMS015 auto-rejection logic for subcontracted purchase requisitions regarding missing peg/GI info, blank business partners, unlinked production orders, and multi-line scenarios.

description.scenario: Create a subcontracted purchase requisition with missing pegging and GI information to verify BPMS015 auto-rejection.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition auto-rejected by BPMS015 due to missing peg/GI info. Rejection email received.

steps.action: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.
Create new requisition line. Input subcontracted item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-*), quantity, price, confirmed receipt date, business partner, and leave pegging and GI information fields blank.
steps.expected_result: Requisition line created with missing peg/GI data.

steps.action: Click on Actions and submit PRQ for approval.
steps.expected_result: PRQ submitted for approval. BPMS015 triggered.

steps.action: BPMS015 performs auto-rejection check. Verify the system rejects the requisition immediately.
Check email inbox for rejection notification.
steps.expected_result: Rejection email received with reason stating missing Peg/GI information.

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Requisition: Blank BP or Employee Supplier

description.scenario: Create a subcontracted purchase requisition with a blank Business Partner or Employee supplier field to verify BPMS015 rejection after buyer review.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected after buyer review with email notification.

steps.action: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.
Create new requisition line. Input subcontracted item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-*), quantity, price, and leave the Business Partner or Employee supplier field blank.
steps.expected_result: Requisition line created with blank BP/Employee field.

steps.action: Click on Actions and submit PRQ for approval.
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email.
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next.
steps.expected_result: Buyer Review completed. Case sent for DOA approval.

steps.action: Complete DOA approval. Refresh Bizagi case and verify case completed with no outstanding actions.
Check email inbox for rejection notification.
steps.expected_result: Rejection email received with reason stating blank BP or Employee supplier.

summary: Subcontracted Requisition: SubConDefault Items Not Linked to Production Orders

description.scenario: Create a subcontracted purchase requisition using a SubConDefault item that is not linked to a production order to verify BPMS015 rejection.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected with email notification due to unlinked production order.

steps.action: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.
Create new requisition line. Input SubConDefault item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-*), quantity, price, and ensure it is not linked to any production order.
steps.expected_result: Requisition line created with unlinked SubConDefault item.

steps.action: Click on Actions and submit PRQ for approval.
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email.
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next.
Complete DOA approval. Refresh Bizagi case and verify case completed with no outstanding actions.
Check email inbox for rejection notification.
steps.expected_result: Rejection email received with reason stating SubConDefault item not linked to production order.

description.scenario: Create a multi-line purchase requisition containing subcontracted items to verify BPMS015 rejection.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected with email notification due to multi-line requisition with subcontracted items.

steps.action: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.
Create first requisition line with a standard cost item (ZZZCST).
Create second requisition line with a subcontracted item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-*).
Click on Actions and submit PRQ for approval.
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email.
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next.
Complete DOA approval. Refresh Bizagi case and verify case completed with no outstanding actions.
Check email inbox for rejection notification.
steps.expected_result: Rejection email received with reason stating multi-line requisition with subcontracted items.

description.scenario: Verify that standard cost purchase requisitions still convert to 137 series POs successfully after the BPMS015 validation changes.
description.expected_result: Cost purchase requisition approved and converted to 137 series PO successfully.

steps.action: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.
Create new requisition line. Input cost item (ZZZCST), quantity, price, confirmed receipt date, business partner, and pegging information (Project and Activity).
Click on Actions and submit PRQ for approval.
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email.
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next.
steps.expected_result: Buyer Review completed. Case sent for DOA approval.

steps.action: Complete DOA approval. Refresh Bizagi case and verify case completed with no outstanding actions.
Go back to Infor LN and refresh purchase requisition screen. Verify PRQ status is Approved.
Go to Bizagi and create a BWQ (BPMS002.1) case. Select buyer, tick purchase requisition tick box, click next.
Select the purchase requisition with correct number. Select transfer against that record, click next.
Refresh the Bizagi case and verify completed with no actions remaining.
Go back to Infor LN and refresh PRQ. Verify status is Converted. Click requisition line > References > Linked Requisition Line Data (tdpur2502s000).
Open purchase order from (tdpur4100m000). Maintain and submit PO for approval.
Complete DOA and supplier response. Open PO in Bizagi BPMS016, complete supplier response ACC.

summary: Standard Cost Purchase Requisition - Unaffected Flow

description.scenario: Verify that standard cost purchase requisitions without subcontracted items still process normally through the approval workflow.
description.expected_result: Standard cost purchase requisition approved and converted to 137 series PO successfully.

steps.action: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.
Create new requisition line. Input cost item (ZZZCST), quantity, price, confirmed receipt date, business partner, and pegging information (Project and Activity).
Click on Actions and submit PRQ for approval.
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email.
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next.
steps.expected_result: Buyer Review completed. Case sent for DOA approval.

steps.action: Complete DOA approval. Refresh Bizagi case and verify case completed with no outstanding actions.
Go back to Infor LN and refresh purchase requisition screen. Verify PRQ status is Approved.
Go to Bizagi and create a BWQ (BPMS002.1) case. Select buyer, tick purchase requisition tick box, click next.
Select the purchase requisition with correct number. Select transfer against that record, click next.
Refresh the Bizagi case and verify completed with no actions remaining.
Go back to Infor LN and refresh PRQ. Verify status is Converted. Click requisition line > References > Linked Requisition Line Data (tdpur2502s000).
Open purchase order from (tdpur4100m000). Maintain and submit PO for approval.
Complete DOA and supplier response. Open PO in Bizagi BPMS016, complete supplier response ACC.
